title: oeceoclades sclerophylla
intro: Oeceoclades sclerophylla, also known as the brown leaved epipogium, is a species of orchid found in tropical Africa. This epiphytic orchid has been found to have medicinal properties, particularly in traditional African medicine, where it is used to treat various ailments including fever and skin conditions. The plant is said to have antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties, which contribute to its health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and fighting off infections. In herbal preparations, Oeceoclades sclerophylla is often used in teas and infusions to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health issues.
